summary: W851 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while discharging W850's universal comparison-isomorphism input. It uses W831 universalLeftRightComparisonIso_of_comparisonBijectivityW831 to feed the W850 selected-cochain direct-source stable route, so the current stable package now depends only on one W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch. The final original four-task witness is still absent because no concrete W735 branch value and no completion review packet have been constructed.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W851 reaches the existing selected-cochain direct-source stable package from one W735 branch, but that branch is still an input rather than a constructed value.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing because no concrete W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch value has been constructed.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still record nonterminal evidence and lack originalFourTaskContractCompletion.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit in the completion packet shape required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct concrete values for one W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch, including W720 endpoint strict-topology data, W721 localized-right-adjoint data, and W722 source-triangulation data.
Expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness using the W851 route after the W735 branch is real.
Refresh the review packet fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
